interface.name: DBeaver
interface.summary: universal database tool and SQL client
interface.description: DBeaver is a free, universal database tool for developers, database administrators, analysts, and everyone working with data. It supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Oracle, DB2, SQL Server, Sybase, MS Access, Teradata, Firebird, Apache Hive, Phoenix, Presto, and many other databases via JDBC.
